patches_self_applied.description: EXP-149 integrated: n(r) empirical fitting defense paragraph inserted after wavelength-selectivity defense in Other Side section. Key argument: n(r) calibrated against Polaris, but same function predicts 52% solar diameter variation (Section 2.4) vs 0.01% observed — first out-of-sample test fails by factor 5,200. Also fixed showTab('refuted') -> showTab('selftest') cross-ref link.
Fixed 'V12 Finsler formula' -> 'V12 coordinate formula' in Part 5 Kill Shots body text. V12 did not use Finsler geometry; Finsler was introduced in V13.
Fixed 11 duplicate style='display:inline;margin:0' attributes on h2 elements in part2.
